creator: brittlehaus@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 166791
.shar file for audio/pd-cyclone

This is a new port that provides functionality to audio/pd through a library of external objects.

These objects were originally designed to provide compatibility with Max/MSP, though Max has since evolved into an incompatible format. This library is very common however in the Pd community and contains many useful objects for programmatic audio synthesis and composition. As opposed to pd-maxlib this port does provide some tilde (audio-handling) objects.

WWW: http://puredata.info/downloads/cyclone/
